sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47579" key="h)/ruge" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἤρῠγε</orth>, <sense id="n47579.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐρεύγομαι</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἠρύκᾰκε</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐρύκω</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
